feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Alert for pending Depreciation Run before closing a particular period
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

This is to inform you that our client wants a system for alert if any Depreciation posting is pending for current period and in that case, it should not allow to close the period. Please provide a suitable solution for this.

Regards,

Shatabdi

entry.title: S4HC | Batch Check Printing
entry.content:
Hi Sir/Ma'am,

Hi Sir/Ma'am,

We would like to ask for your assistance on what scope items are needed to be activated for Batch Check Printing if this is standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, as well as any documentation, if ever.

Thank you.

 

Sincerely,

Melvin Banggo

entry.title: Flexible Workflow – Multiple Workflow Determination for Purchasing Group and Material Group
entry.content:
Our business requirement is to maintain two different approval groups:

* Approval Group 1: Based on Purchasing Group (e.g., VMU) with Approver 1 and Approver 2.
* Approval Group 2: Based on Material Group with Approver 3 and Approver 4.

For specific Material Groups, the workflow should be routed only to the Material Group approvers (Approver 3 and Approver 4). The Purchasing Group workflow should not be triggered for these Material Groups.

However, when we configure both workflows, both are triggered because the Purchasing Group condition is also satisfied.

entry.title: Add auxiliary packaging material to an existing Handling unit in the Warehouse via API
entry.content:
Hi,
We would like to add auxiliary packaging material to an existing WM Handling unit. 
I found in the constraints that we can't create an HU with Auxiliary packaging material, but it doesn't explicit we can't add them. 
Handling Unit | SAP Help Portal 

In parallel I also created a customer influence ticket for it: 
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/377179

Kr Jeroen

entry.title: Standard API required for Manage Workforce App
entry.content:
We need a standard API to fetch the work agreement details ( Work agreement ID, Start Date and End Date ) and Worker Types details(Worker type, start date and End Date ) from the standard app "MANAGE WORKFORCE" .


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Edit worker data
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Manage Workforce


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: "Country/region is not active in your system" when maintaining RITA countries in SSCUI 103464
entry.content:
When attempting to maintain a foreign tax registration country/region in SSCUI 103464 (Activate RITA and Maintain Tax Registration Countries/Regions), the following error may occur:

FOT_TXA080 – Country/region <XX> is not active in your system.

In some cases, the additional message "RITA cannot be activated for country/region *" may also be displayed, even though the country/region is listed as supported for Registration for Indirect Taxation Abroad (RITA).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: F4 for Sales Invoice Header from custom field through custom table
entry.content:
Business has requested for a field named 'Policy Name' with F4 button in Sales Invoice header. Policy name that will be populating in F4 will be maintained in a custom app. We have created a custom table. How we can add this table as an F4 for custom field in VF01/02.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Vendor Evaluation Variance Score in SAP S4hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I would like to know how are variance scores setting in SAP S4hana public cloud

Please suggest me. 

Regards.

Keratiya D.

entry.title: Cannot use country group in manage allocation
entry.content: I have created the country group from application manage global hierarchies but cannot use with application manage allocation (See attached file)

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud | CO11N Goods Movement Validation via BAdI
entry.content:
I'm working on a tricky ABAP extensibility challenge in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and would love inputs from anyone who has tackled something similar.

📌 The Business Problem

During Production Order confirmation (CO11N), SAP allows users to freely manipulate the goods movement data before posting - changing storage locations, modifying quantities, adding new components, or outright deleting existing BOM component lines. This is causing serious data integrity issues between our Production Order BOM, reservations, and actual goods movements.

We needed strict validation: what gets posted must exactly match the original BOM and reservation - no exceptions.

What We've Built So Far

We implemented custom validation logic across BAdIs:

✅ Rule 1: Block SLoc change → Working fine in
BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM.
✅ Rule 2a: if Quantity less and great than equal → Working fine.
✅ Rule 3: Block unauthorised component addition → Working fine.

⚠️ Rule 2b: Block quantity change vs. reservation → Partially working (greater/less than caught, but Zero/blank not)

❌ Rule 4: Block component line deletion → NOT implemented yet
This is the hardest one. Since deleted lines never even trigger the per-item BAdI.

What I'm Looking For


Has anyone implemented deletion detection or if quantity zero & blank using BADI_MMIM_CHECK_MATDOC_ITEM in Public Cloud?
Any experience comparing BOM/reservation components against posted movement items at ITEM level?
Any gotchas with I_ProductionOrderComponent or I_ReservationDocumentItem in this context?
Best practices for raising clean error messages from ITEM-level BAdIs in Public Cloud.?

All of this is in S/4HANA Public Cloud ABAP.

If you've tried something similar- whether it worked or not- I'd love to hear about it. Every experience helps.

entry.title: Cloud Application Programming For SAP Functional Consultant
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Is it required to Lean Cloud application programming language to every functional consultant in this Cloud and AI era.

If yes how to start and if basic understanding required could you please share the links so that can prepare and start the learning.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Regards,

Ashish

entry.title: Error while posting asset retirement
entry.content:
While posting asset retirement entries through the Post Asset Retirement app, we are receiving an error stating that G/L account 0030100017 is locked for Asset Class Z001.

However, the same G/L account 0030100017 is assigned to other asset classes, and asset retirement postings are completed successfully without any error for those classes.

The same issue was also observed for Asset Class Z002.

I am sharing the screenshots of the Asset Account Determination key settings along with the asset posting error message for your reference. Kindly review and check the issue.

entry.title: How to restrict access to specific cost centers in SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: I am struggling to see if we can restrict user so that only the cost centers which relates to them are visible when raising purchase requisition. Is there a way to restrict so that the user dosesnt see all the cost centers and only relevant ones.

entry.title: Inquiry regarding Form Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi support,

Here I have an inquiry regarding the form extensibility for the below forms:
Order Data List form (PP_MOR_DATA_LIST) - FDP_PP_MOR_DATA_LIST_SRV
Sales Scheduling Agreement Print Form (SD_SLS_SCHEDULING_AGREEMENT) -FDP_PP_MOR_DATA_LIST_SRV.

The requirements are to extend multiple fields to the respective forms that do not have released table nor standard CDS to extend.

The method we could proceed is by using Custom App with custom CDS Views.

We will like to know the best practice suggest by SAP to proceed with this inquiry.

Thank you.

 

Regards,
Neoh

entry.title: How to create a sub wbs element in sap public cloud
entry.content: How to create a sub WBS element in sap public cloud under a main WBS element and if created where to check its impact and its relationship with Main WBS element.

entry.title: How can a sub-WBS element be created in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Since A new demand with the same WBS Element + Cost Center + Activity Type combination also cannot be created in sap. so as workaround sub wbs element creation is given.

So, how can a sub-WBS element be created in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and what impact does it have when a demand is assigned to it?

Specifically, does assigning a demand to a sub-WBS element affect any FI/CO (Finance and Controlling) processes in an investment project?

Additionally, how does the demand function when it is assigned to a sub-WBS, and what is the relationship between the main WBS element and the sub-WBS element in terms of cost collection, reporting, and settlement?

In our scenario, demands are primarily used for labour (resource) planning. Could you also clarify any implications specific to this setup?

entry.title: Error when importing spreadsheet in configuration activity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

While trying to import a configuration spreadsheet in any configuration activity i get the following error:

Sorry, the app couldn't be opened.

The navigation target "#BusinessConfiguration-upload?IMGActivity=CFORFBTHKON&ObjectName=V_THKON&ObjectType=V&SubObjectName=&sap-app-origin-hint=&sap-language=E&sap-ushell-navmode=explace" of the app could not be resolved. This can be caused, for example, by an incorrect content configuration, an incorrect or missing role assignment, or because your current device is not supported.

I'm using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and accessing it through the "implementation activities" app.
I have the BR_BPC_Expert Role with no restrictions and can access all configuration activities. With that in mind I can't import the spreadsheets but can export them in all allowed configuration activities.

Can anyone help me with this problem?

Thank you,
Diogo Boneco

entry.title: Lease out contracts cannot be attached to usable object
entry.content: I tried creating a lease out contract from a usable object I created. But I get an error saying the usable object cannot be assigned lease out contracts. I then created a rentable object and assigned a usable object to it, but there is no section to create a contract from the rentable object. So I went to create a standalone contract , but still cannot assign the usable object to the contract

entry.title: No Project report with correct Budget available (Budget AVC remaining)
entry.content:
1 Do settlement process from workorder (21000042) to WBS with overhead project profile.  

2 Display report P&L Plan/Actual found the transaction

3 Display report Project budget report and Project cost report display actual cost zero.  and Budget available remaining loss cost consume from work order. (no Budget avc remaining in item details)

4 Display report Monitor project only found in project level (not in WBS level) and found budget available remaining that include cost consume from work order.

5 Which one of item 3 or item 4 contains the correct amount of budget available remaining (avc remaining amount) 

7 The project contains budget at WBS level (avc control 100% with error), what sap standard reports can display Total budget, actual cost (include cost from work order), commitment, assigned cost (act+com), Budget avc remaining both project and wbs level (in project hierarchy).

8. work order consume wbs budget since step pr/po/activity confirmation or during settlement process?

entry.title: I have a question about accounting entries for credit risk-based impairment provisioning.
entry.content: 我需要知道是否可以将基于信用风险的减值会计分录记为借方“信用减值损失”，贷记为“坏账准备”，不想直接记账到对账科目
